pageContext.name: Ultramarines Outriders Brother Catonus
pageContext.description: Sideshow and Joytoy proudly present the Ultramarines Outriders Brother Catonus 1:18 Scale Collectible Figure!  The most elite of the Space Marine Chapters in the Imperium of Man, the Ultramarines from Warhammer 40k comes to life with this new series of 1:18 scale figures. Outrider Squads rove in advance of the main Space Marine lines, guarding flanks of larger formations or hunting down enemy infiltrators.  Don't miss your chance to add this figure to your Warhammer 40k collection today!
